synthesis_narrative: The key tension today: technical and internals both lean bearish (CLEAN_BEAR ribbon, gap-down overnight, XLK -1.84% risk-off rotation), but macro is neutral (zero events, VIX flat at 17.79, orderly selling) and level_thesis is MISSING — removing the critical structural anchor that would either validate or refute the bearish case with hard level context. The v5 confidence formula produces a raw score of -8 (base 27, -10 for 2/4 agreement, -25 for UNTESTED battle grade due to missing level_thesis), firing the NO_TRADE gate: the swarm abstains with an underlying bearish lean but insufficient evidence to commit. The single most important thing to watch at open: whether SPY holds above or fails below 735.69 (slow EMA) in the first 30 min — that is the line between bear-ribbon-rejection continuation toward 733.09 and a bull-invalidation reclaim toward 738.73.
